description.value: S3 Technic Pvt Ltd is an agricultural machinery manufacturer based in Noida, dedicated to providing robust and efficient solutions for the modern farming sector. They specialize in producing a range of equipment designed to enhance agricultural productivity and streamline farming operations.

address.value: Unit No. F-123, Sector-8, Sector-8, Noida, Gautambuddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh, 201301

bio.value:
S3 Technics is a manufacturing start up created by two engineers from IIT Delhi and BITS Pilani. With over 20 years of experience in the field of engineering and manufacturing, we specialize in building special purpose automation machines and Laser land leveler (an electronic leveling machine for agricultural and construction purposes).
We have recently set a production unit for indigenous manufacturing of commutators which at present are largely being imported from China. 
Our Youtube channel will be dedicated to give our customers a view of our expertise and our past/present projects.

catalog_items.description: This is a Bluetooth-enabled laser land leveller, an agricultural machinery designed for precision land preparation. It uses laser technology to ensure accurate levelling of fields, which is crucial for efficient irrigation and crop growth.

A bright yellow agricultural machine, identified as a laser land leveler from S3 Technics, designed for precision farming. It features a robust frame, multiple wheels, hydraulic components, and a prominent laser receiver mast.

The S3 Laser Leveller is an agricultural machinery product, presented as being available in 12 different colors. It is designed for farm technology applications, likely for land leveling, and is shown packaged in a protective case.

catalog_items.raw_name: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)
catalog_items.clean_name: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)
catalog_items.description: The S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller is a precision land levelling equipment manufactured in India. It uses an electronically levelled rotating laser plane as a reference, along with a laser receiver, control box, and hydraulic system. This setup ensures the scraper blade edge remains parallel to a perfectly levelled laser plane for accurate land preparation.
catalog_items.seo_title: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)
catalog_items.alt_text: S3T Laser Guided Land Leveller (Laser Samtal)

specifications.components: Laser receiver, control box, hydraulic system, scraper blade
specifications.control_box_model: S3 Technics Laser Samtal Control Box LSCB S. NO. 012106

social_source.caption:
Presenting the S3T manufactured Laser Guided Land Leveller. Our equipment is made in India ensuring highest quality and seamless after sales support. Check out more details on our website www.s3technics.com

Laser Land Leveller (also called Laser Samtal) is precision land levelling equipment. It utilizes an electronically levelled rotating laser plane as reference with laser receiver, control box and hydraulic system to maintain the scraper blade edge parallel to a perfectly levelled laser plane, thereby filling the tractor driven bucket with soil from high spots and releasing that soil to low spots of the field.

Land Levelling has multiple benefits, the prime among them being reduced use of water and better yield of crop. A Laser guided land leveler ensures precision leveling  upto 4mm. 

#laserlandleveler #lasersamtal #laserleveller #laserleveler #computermanjha #laserlevel #agritech #agriculture #haryana #punjab #andhrapradesh

catalog_items.raw_name: Fully Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine
catalog_items.clean_name: Fully Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine
catalog_items.description: This is a fully automated machine designed to assemble aerosol pumps and their compatible tubes. It requires minimal user input, only for filling the vibratory feeder with aerosol pumps and keeping the tube roll in the designated area. The entire assembly process is automated, including the vibratory feeder aligning pumps uniformly to prevent incorrect assembly.
catalog_items.seo_title: Fully Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine
catalog_items.alt_text: Fully Automated Aerosol Pump and Tube Assembly Machine

specifications.User Input Required: Fill vibratory feeder with aerosol pumps, keep tube roll in designated area
specifications.Assembly Process: Fully automated, including vibratory feeder aligning pumps

social_source.caption:
A fully automated machine to assemble the aerosol pump and it's compatible tube. 
The only user inputs required are to fill up the vibratory feeder with the aerosol pumps and keep the tube roll in the designated area. The entire process of assembly is fully automated including the vibratory feeder aligning the pumps in a uniformed manner to avoid any incorrect assembly. 
Watch the video for a complete look!

reviews.author: Sripriya Singh
reviews.text: efficient machine building and prompt after sales service for assembly machines and laser land leveller for agricultural purposes. High class technology adopted for design of laser guided  land levellers

reviews.author: harsh kanojia
reviews.text: Extremely satisfied with he service, we have had a relationship of over 5 years with s3 technics.always available on call, prompt response and quality services. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Max Yoo
reviews.text: Amazing quality of equipment and services, their website is also outstandingly visible and crisp
reviews.owner_response: Thanks a lot for your kind review.

reviews.author: Jagdeep Singh
reviews.text: Great Quality and prompt after sales support.

reviews.author: anuj rana
reviews.owner_response:
Dear Anuj!
It is unfortunate to see your review after 2 years of tireless service from our side, despite accidental damages from your end. As iterated before, we will be unable to serve rowdy customers.
Have a pleasant day ahead and stay safe :)
